sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26543" key="diektu/lwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διεκ-τύλωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n26543.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">removal of a callus,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
